document.name: Stand25 Bisztró
document.shortDescription: Market-driven bistro by Rákóczi tér — daily chalkboard menus from top Hungarian chefs at Hold utca.
document.longDescription:
Stand25 Bisztró on Hold utca serves concise daily menus built from fresh market ingredients, a short walk from Rákóczi tér. The open kitchen and counter seats suit lunch and early dinner. Reservations on stand25bisztro.hu.

Sources: https://www.stand25bisztro.hu/
